Some glyphs are higher, but current production vertical size is still 900 -300.
There are 2 AringAcutes now and lacute hcircumflex have lower ascenders to make it all fit.

For a production with vietnamese, Vsize must be 980 -320 like the rest of TheSansMixSerif family
